channel.title: Ncl on Yu Cheng
channel.description: Recent content in Ncl on Yu Cheng

item.title: iPython notebook gallery
item.description: Sometimes I got emails requesting codes to plot certain things. Those inquiries remind me that I have an older version of my website on Wordpress.com still up and running. That was an answer to the requirement that every student in RSMAS should have their own websites back in 2014. To fill in the blanks, I listed out some of my python works in Ipython notebooks.
